reviews.comment:
Es un lugar hermoso.
Bien atendido.
Pasamos koche en el motorjome en el.parque de atrás, antiguamente recreo del ACA, muy limpio, aunque no esté confeccionado el.restaurante de atrás. Fogones  y parque hermoso. Ideal.para hacer parada.
Llovía esa noche así q cenamosny dormimos ahí.

(Translated by Google)
It's a beautiful place.
Good service.
We spent time in the motorhome in the back park, formerly the ACA recreation area. It was very clean, even though the restaurant in the back isn't finished. There are fire pits and a beautiful park. Ideal for a stop.
It was raining that night, so we had dinner and slept there.

reviews.comment:
18/11/25 6 de la mañana , pésima atención ,  no había medialunas, el café tardo un montón y llego frío, las tazas sin platos y encima ni un vaso de agua nos dieron, siempre desayunamos en YPF, esta , tiene mala atención, espero que sea porque era muy temprano jajaja

(Translated by Google)
11/18/25 6 AM, terrible service, no croissants, the coffee took ages and arrived cold, the cups had no saucers and they didn't even give us a glass of water. We always have breakfast at YPF, this one has bad service, I hope it's because it was so early hahaha

Cold coffee, slow. Sunday morning, not worth stopping.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días , lamentamos lo sucedido. Tu mensaje nos ayuda a mejorar y a continuar trabajando para una mejor atención. Te pedimos disculpas y te invitamos a volver a pasar. Saludos

reviews.comment:
Si sos socio de ACÁ y vas a cargar agua, avisá porque es gratis. Ellos no te preguntan y te cobran la ficha.

(Translated by Google)
If you're an ACÁ member and you're going to fill up your water tank, let them know because it's free. They don't ask and they charge you for the token.
